summary: Iteration 22 - P0 Assembly Stability Tests. All 22 backend tests passed. Verified: MongoDB assembly_jobs collection (not in-memory), no immediate deletion on status read, TTL index (3600s), unique jobId index, FFmpeg 'veryfast' preset, still-to-clip and trim-video endpoints, frontend adaptive polling with 404/502/503 tolerance, retryApiCall wrapper. Frontend compiles and loads correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint returns 200
Backend: Login works with test@example.com / test123456
Backend: GET /api/projects returns projects list (regression)
Backend: GET /api/effects/list returns effects (regression)
Backend: POST /api/video/assemble endpoint exists (returns 400/404 for invalid input)
Backend: GET /api/video/assemble/{jobId}/status returns 404 for non-existent job
Backend: Assembly validation works ('Need at least 1 clip' error)
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/media/still-to-clip endpoint exists (returns 400 for missing image)
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/media/trim-video endpoint exists (returns 400 for missing video)
Code Review: assembly_jobs uses MongoDB collection (db.assembly_jobs.find_one, db.assembly_jobs.update_one)
Code Review: No in-memory dict for assembly_jobs
Code Review: No immediate deletion on status read (no delete_one in get_assembly_status)
Code Review: TTL index on createdAt with 3600 seconds (1 hour auto-cleanup)
Code Review: Unique index on jobId
Code Review: FFmpeg uses 'veryfast' preset (6 occurrences, 0 'fast' only)
Code Review: Job creation includes createdAt timestamp for TTL
Frontend Code Review: pollJobStatus uses setTimeout (adaptive polling, not setInterval)
Frontend Code Review: Polling tolerates 404 errors (MAX_NOT_FOUND = 5 retries)
Frontend Code Review: Polling handles 502/503 gateway errors gracefully
Frontend Code Review: retryApiCall wrapper with 3 retries and backoff (1.5s, 3s, 4.5s)
Frontend Code Review: prepareLibraryClips uses retryApiCall wrapper
Frontend Code Review: Adaptive polling intervals (2s for first 10, then 4s, then 6s)
Frontend: Step6AssembleVideo.js compiles without errors (yarn build succeeded)
Frontend: Login page loads correctly with proper styling
Frontend: Dashboard loads after login showing projects list
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Fix 1 (MongoDB Job Store) VERIFIED: assembly_jobs now uses db.assembly_jobs MongoDB collection with _get_assembly_job, _set_assembly_job, _update_assembly_job helpers. No in-memory dict.
P0 Fix 2 (No Immediate Deletion) VERIFIED: get_assembly_status only reads job from MongoDB, no delete operations. Jobs auto-expire via TTL.
P0 Fix 3 (TTL Index) VERIFIED: db.assembly_jobs.create_index('createdAt', expireAfterSeconds=3600) - jobs auto-cleanup after 1 hour
P0 Fix 4 (Unique Index) VERIFIED: db.assembly_jobs.create_index('jobId', unique=True) - prevents duplicate jobs
P0 Fix 5 (FFmpeg Preset) VERIFIED: All FFmpeg commands use '-preset veryfast' (6 occurrences in server.py)
P0 Fix 6 (Frontend Retry Logic) VERIFIED: retryApiCall wrapper with 3 retries and exponential backoff (1.5s, 3s, 4.5s)
P0 Fix 7 (Adaptive Polling) VERIFIED: pollJobStatus uses setTimeout with adaptive intervals (2s→4s→6s based on pollCount)
P0 Fix 8 (Error Tolerance) VERIFIED: Polling tolerates 404 (5 retries), 502/503 (continues polling), 401 (15 retries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified P0 assembly stability fixes: (1) assembly_jobs moved from in-memory dict to MongoDB collection with TTL auto-cleanup after 1 hour, (2) Jobs not deleted on status read - they persist until TTL expires, (3) Frontend polling uses adaptive intervals (2s→4s→6s) with setTimeout, (4) Frontend tolerates 404/502/503 errors during polling, (5) prepareLibraryClips uses retryApiCall wrapper with 3 retries and backoff, (6) FFmpeg preset changed from 'fast' to 'veryfast' for better performance. Note: Actual assembly still requires real media files on disk - test projects return 'Need at least 1 clip' which is expected behavior.

verified_features.no_immediate_deletion: VERIFIED - get_assembly_status only reads, no delete operations
verified_features.frontend_adaptive_polling: VERIFIED - setTimeout with 2s/4s/6s intervals based on pollCount
verified_features.frontend_404_tolerance: VERIFIED - MAX_NOT_FOUND=5 retries before giving up
verified_features.frontend_502_503_tolerance: VERIFIED - continues polling on gateway errors
verified_features.frontend_compilation: VERIFIED - yarn build succeeded with only ESLint warnings
